title: CodeGrind: Visualizing Tower-Defense Coding
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind visualizes programming concepts as towers in Code Breach, highlighting the cyberpunk aesthetic and real-time AI assistance features.
core_message: CodeGrind blends interactive DSA practice with a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic, where coding concepts become defensive towers and AI-assisted guidance helps students improve in real time.
cta: Try CodeGrind now and see how coding concepts build powerful towers with AI help.
visual_brief: Static hero-style image featuring cyberpunk-themed Code Breach towers (ForLoop, IfCondition, Function, Variable) on a neon cityscape backdrop. Include subtle UI elements like a code editor pane, AI chat badge, and tower attack particles to convey interactivity without animation.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
